name: Easy Biscuit Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and 2 teaspoons of salt.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Store the biscuit mix in an airtight container for up to 6 weeks at room temperature or for up to 6 months in the freezer.
